title: Slemprix's Essentials
description: This Modpack Aims To Optimize Your QoL, Ping and FPS
body:
![proof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e500a7362f975287832d60b8bb06025de9debce.png)

This Modpack Aims To Optimize Your QoL, Ping and FPS 

This Modpack has been re built Some of the builds are using the essentially optimized modpack as a base
 
### Credits Go Towards The Original Mod authors and resource pack authors For Making the Mods And Resource packs Shown Here 

With the modpack i was getting 240+ FPS On a IGPU laptop 

I Recommend Using The 1.21.11 Build But the other Builds are Good Too And I Recommend Using Java 25 for All The Builds Tho its Optional

### 1.Will this Ever Support Other Mod Loaders?

# No Its Too Much Work and Mod support on forge is basically dead

### 2.Can I Reupload This Modpack?

Depends on The Licenses Of the Mods if they Allow Reuploading to other websites

### If you have any issues with crashes uppon installing the modpack Please Join the discord server and go to the bug report channel

### This Mod will NEVER officially support Mobile Java Launchers as Not all the Mods that give significant performance improvements officially Support Them Like sodium This Modpack MIGHT stil work but any issues reported on the discord server Will instantly be dismissed and never be looked uppon
